args.query: SELECT p."System", p."Name", p."Version", p."UpstreamPublishedAt" FROM packageinfo p JOIN (SELECT "Name", MAX("UpstreamPublishedAt") as max_up FROM packageinfo WHERE "System"='NPM' AND "UpstreamPublishedAt" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY "Name") m ON p."Name" = m."Name" AND p."UpstreamPublishedAt" = m.max_up WHERE p."System"='NPM';

exec_args.sql: SELECT p."System", p."Name", p."Version", p."UpstreamPublishedAt" FROM packageinfo p JOIN (SELECT "Name", MAX("UpstreamPublishedAt") as max_up FROM packageinfo WHERE "System"='NPM' AND "UpstreamPublishedAt" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY "Name") m ON p."Name" = m."Name" AND p."UpstreamPublishedAt" = m.max_up WHERE p."System"='NPM';
